home.title: Scan waste and know what to do
home.subtitle: Place an item in the frame. AI will identify its waste type and suggest the right disposal method.
home.scan_card_subtitle: Capture one clear item in good lighting for a more reliable result.
home.privacy_note: Photos and scan results stay in the app's private storage. In demo mode, photos never leave your device.

scan.instruction: Keep one item inside the frame and make it clear
scan.torch_unavailable: The torch is not available on this device right now.
scan.analyzing_hint: AI is comparing your image with known waste classes. This will only take a moment.
scan.camera_error: The camera could not start. Check your device camera and try again.

permissions.camera_description: The app needs the camera to capture and classify waste. Your photo is used only for your analysis.

errors.title: Classification unavailable
errors.no_connection: There is no internet connection. Check your connection and try again.
errors.timeout: The model took too long to respond. Please try another photo.
errors.invalid_response: The model returned an invalid result. Please try again later.
errors.model_unavailable: AI is temporarily unavailable. Capture a clearer item or try again later.

result.title: Classification result
result.low_confidence: This result is uncertain. Try another angle, use better lighting, and keep only one item in the frame.

settings.title: Settings
settings.language_description: Choose the display language for the entire app.
settings.demo_mode_description: The complete scan flow is ready for demonstrations. Results are simulated until an ONNX model file or stable endpoint is available.
settings.api_mode_description: Photos are sent to the configured endpoint only for classification; the app does not use cloud storage services.
settings.privacy_local: Photos, scan results, and language preferences are stored only in the app's private storage on your device.
settings.privacy_api: A photo is sent to the model for inference when you scan. The app's result and photo copy remain stored locally on your device.
